SEARCH
Package com.example.abacus_app

Class UserRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.abacus_app.UserRepository
public class UserRepository extends Object
Architecture Layer: Repository Coordinates user initialization and synchronization between local SharedPreferences storage and Firebase Firestore. Used by: ProfileFragment, ProfileViewModel, MainActivity

    • clearLocalSession

      public void clearLocalSession()
      Clears the locally stored UUID and signs out of Firebase Auth. After this call the device has no identity; the next call to initializeUser() will generate a fresh UUID and anonymous session.
